disclaimer: Parkin tariffs and Nol fares change. Verify with parkin.ae and rta.ae before quoting figures. CRITICAL: 'Mawaqif' is Abu Dhabi, not Dubai. Dubai paid parking is operated by Parkin Company PJSC.

naming_correction.explanation: Mawaqif is the Abu Dhabi parking system. Dubai paid parking is run by Parkin Company PJSC. Use 'Parkin' or 'Dubai parking' in tools, never 'Mawaqif'.

zones.unverified_note: Zone letters G through K appear in third-party sources but need first-party confirmation from parkin.ae.

mparking.example: Send 'A12345 A1 2' to 7275 for 2 hours in zone A1 with plate A12345.
mparking.note: The 'P2335' code that appears in older guides is NOT a system-wide code.

datasets_status.rta_parking_rates_open: OBSOLETE per the publisher. Predates the April 2025 variable tariff and cannot be trusted as a current rate source.
datasets_status.real_time_availability: No public real-time availability API. Parkin holds it internally.

rta_fares.transfer_note: 30-minute multi-modal transfer rule applies (metro to bus, bus to tram, etc.).
rta_fares.gtfs_fares_status: rta_gtfs-open feed may include fare_attributes.txt and fare_rules.txt. UNVERIFIED. Download the 7z to confirm.

nol_cards.best_for: Premium Gold Class metro and bus seating
Registered, replaceable if lost, supports concessionary fares
